contract.payment_cadence: Ordering Period basis (annually); NRE billed at Task Order level
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Black Swift S0 sUAS Platforms: 150 units @ $18,000 (Period 1), 150 @ $18,630 (Period 2), 125 @ $19,282 (Period 3), 125 @ $19,957 (Period 4), 125 @ $20,655 (Period 5)

Mission Days Operational support (30 @ $2,850 per period × 5 periods = $427,500) + Operational and Testing Support (6 @ $6,000 × 5 = $180,000) + Training Sessions (Operator/Observer 1 @ $6,000 × 5 + Instructor 1 @ $600 × 5 = $33,000) + Course Development (1 @ $6,000 × 2 per period × 5 = $60,000) + NRE Labor (estimated based on labor categories provided for Task Order level billing)
Travel for Operational Support (ODC-NTE): $50,000 per ordering period × 5 periods
Non-recurring Engineering: Technical Documentation ($66,000 × 5), Modeling ($66,000 × 5), NHC operational workflow integration ($66,000 × 5)
